nodes.label: AI as email organization and tone assistant
nodes.grounding_span: help me properly organize the content of the email, and sometimes to help make sure the tone remains professional

nodes.label: AI for professional vs personal communication
nodes.grounding_span: If the emails are more personal in nature I prefer to write them myself

nodes.label: AI as learning tool for future writing
nodes.label_negative: Complete reliance on AI for writing
nodes.grounding_span: using AI can help me with ideas on how to phrase things, or organize emails for the future

nodes.label: Professional competence and skill improvement
nodes.grounding_span: I am always trying to improve my own skills

nodes.label: Personal autonomy and authenticity
nodes.grounding_span: If the emails are more personal in nature I prefer to write them myself

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for organizing complex emails
nodes.grounding_span: I was quite satisfied with the outcome, as my employer responded well to my concerns

nodes.label: Resistance to AI for personal communication
nodes.grounding_span: If the emails are more personal in nature I prefer to write them myself

nodes.label: Openness to AI as learning aid
nodes.grounding_span: using AI can help me with ideas on how to phrase things, or organize emails for the future

nodes.label: Selective and independent AI adoption
nodes.grounding_span: I have chosen to use it independently, although it is not often

nodes.label: Draft-first then refine approach
nodes.grounding_span: I usually draft an email first then ask for help from AI
